The Home

Life on the quiet side of Hội An

Ta.Garden sits on Cam Nam Island — the peaceful, lesser-known twin of Hội An's Ancient Town. Separated from the old city by a narrow river crossing, it's a ten-minute walk or bike ride to lantern-lit streets, yet feels a world away from the tourist bustle.

This three-storey home was designed with intention: carved wood banisters, handmade silk lanterns, a living staircase garden, and curated rooms that feel like a private sanctuary rather than a rental. Each space has its own identity, its own light, its own quiet.

Monthly tenants share a thoughtfully designed common living area while enjoying fully private bedrooms and en-suite bathrooms. It is a home — not a hostel.

Rooms & Pricing

Three rooms, one home

All rooms include WiFi, water utilities, hotel-quality linens, and shared access to the living room, kitchen, and garden. Electricity is metered separately by usage.

Floor 2

The River Room

Second-floor bedroom with a botanical feature wall, rattan pendant lights, and warm wooden ceiling. Peaceful, private, and beautifully finished.

Private en-suite Queen bed Botanical wallpaper
8,000,000  VND / month
≈ $320 USD · billed monthly
Floor 2

The Garden Room

Garden-view bedroom with earthy tones, natural textures, and lush indoor plants. A calm, grounded space with its own distinct character and private en-suite.

Private en-suite Garden view Queen bed
9,000,000  VND / month
≈ $360 USD · billed monthly
Floor 3 — The Crown

The Sky Suite

An entire private floor. Exposed beam cathedral ceilings, your own fully-equipped kitchen, a private balcony with open sky views, and a creative lounge and studio space. The most complete private living experience in Ta.Garden.

Private kitchen Private balcony Full floor Exposed beams Creative studio
14,000,000  VND / month
≈ $560 USD · billed monthly

Comparable Hội An river properties on Airbnb: $60–90/night. The Sky Suite is exceptional value for a fully private top-floor monthly stay.

Location

Cam Nam Island — the hidden side

  • Hội An Ancient Town10 min
  • An Bàng Beach15 min
  • Cửa Đại Beach15 min
  • Đà Nẵng Airport40 min
  • Nearest café2 min
  • Morning market5 min
  • Thu Bồn RiverWalk

Cam Nam is Hội An's best-kept secret — an island neighborhood connected to the Ancient Town by a short bridge. Life here is genuinely local: rice paper workshops, fishing boats at dawn, neighbourhood cafés, and the smell of phở from someone's kitchen window.

The home is easily explored by bicycle, which can be arranged. The Ancient Town's lantern streets, tailors, night market, and riverfront restaurants are all within a comfortable ride.

"Close enough to feel the magic of Hội An. Far enough to actually rest."

What's Included

Everything you need to settle in

⚡
WiFi & Water Included
High-speed WiFi and water are included. Electricity is metered and billed by usage — you only pay for what you use.
🋹
Hotel-Quality Linens
White cotton hotel sheets, quality pillows, mattress protectors, and fresh towels provided.
🤹
Wellness Access
Yoga mats, blocks, and a dedicated meditation space — part of the Soul & Luna ethos.
🍵
Tea Culture
Curated tea selection and ceramic sets in the shared kitchen. The first pot is always waiting.
🏠
Shared Common Areas
Living room, shared kitchen, and garden. Private space with genuine community.
📷
A Beautiful Home
Locally sourced art, handmade lanterns, a living staircase garden. You'll want to photograph everything.
🌿
The Garden  — Coming Soon
A dedicated garden space is currently being cultivated right next to the rice fields — soon to house fresh Vietnamese vegetables, medicinal herbs, and a beautiful shaded seating area where you can catch the breeze, sip tea, and watch the fields sway. Tenants will have full access as it grows.

House Guidelines

A home of mutual respect

This is a space for
  • Quiet, focused work and creative living
  • Respectful, conscious co-habitation
  • Monthly or extended stays (min. 1 month)
  • Yoga, meditation, and personal wellness
  • Remote work — fast WiFi throughout
  • Guests with prior notice to the host
  • Celebrating the slow rhythm of Hội An
Please note
  • No parties or noise after 10pm
  • No smoking inside the home
  • No sub-letting your room
  • Shared spaces kept clean and tidy
  • Motorbike parking available in the yard
  • First month's rent paid in advance
  • One month's notice required to vacate

Questions

Everything you need to know

Is the WiFi fast enough for remote work?
Yes — high-speed fibre WiFi is included in the rent and runs throughout the whole home. It's been reliably used for video calls, design work, and large file uploads. You can test it yourself on arrival before committing to your stay.
What's the minimum stay?
The minimum stay is one month. Ta.Garden is designed for people who want to actually settle in — to get to know the neighbourhood, find a favourite café, and feel genuinely at home. Short stays occasionally open up; send an enquiry and ask.
Can I extend my stay once I'm here?
Absolutely — most guests do. Just let us know at least two weeks before your current agreement ends and we'll confirm availability. Long-term stays (3+ months) are especially welcomed and we're happy to discuss adjusted terms.
What's included in the monthly rent?
Your room, hotel-quality linens and towels, high-speed WiFi, water utilities, access to all shared spaces (living room, kitchen, garden), yoga mats, meditation space, and the communal tea station. Electricity is metered separately and billed by usage — you only pay for what you use.
Is it quiet enough for focused work and writing?
This is something guests mention most. Cam Nam Island moves at a gentle pace — no tourist crowds, no blaring music. The home itself has a house guideline of no noise after 10pm, and the residents who choose Ta.Garden tend to be conscious, low-key people. It's a genuinely calm place to think.
How do I secure a room?
Send an enquiry below and we'll respond within 24 hours. To secure your room, a refundable security deposit (50% of one month's rent) is due within 72 hours of confirmation — this holds your dates. Your first month's rent is then due before move-in. The security deposit is fully returned at checkout.
What are the local food and transport options like?
Cam Nam has a small morning market, neighbourhood phở shops, and a handful of excellent local cafés — all within a 5-minute walk or cycle. A bicycle is the best way to get around and can be arranged. The Ancient Town, beaches, and Đà Nẵng airport are all easily accessible.
Can I receive guests or visitors?
Yes, with prior notice to the host. Overnight guests should be mentioned in advance out of respect for other residents. The home is a shared space and the vibe matters — so we ask for a little care around this. Day visitors are generally no issue at all.
The Process

How Booking Works

01
Enquire & Get Confirmed
Submit your details and preferred dates. We confirm availability and send your booking confirmation within 24 hours.
02
Pay Security Deposit
Pay your refundable security deposit within 72 hours of confirmation to secure your room. Fully returned at checkout.
03
Pay First Month's Rent
Pay your first month's rent before your move-in date via your personal guest portal. We'll send you the payment link once your deposit is confirmed.
04
Move In & Stay
Monthly rent is due one month from your move-in date, recurring on the same date each month. Your security deposit is returned in full at checkout.

Cancellation & Refunds

Our Policy

Your security deposit is refundable based on how far in advance you cancel. After move-in, 7 days written notice is required. Force majeure is always considered with care.

Security deposit due within 72 hours of confirmation or your room is released.
